name: tadabbur-root
description: Root orchestration for Tadabbur Frontend and Backend

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "cd backend && ./venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend -- --run && cd backend && ./venv/bin/pytest tests/
